title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: The map stays current
gist.blurb: The API field guide received its tiny post-deploy trim. One less stale breadcrumb in the garden.
gist.summary: Regenerated APIDOCS.md from the production OpenAPI specification to keep the published API reference aligned with the deployed service.
gist.impact: Developers reading the API docs get documentation that matches the current production API behavior.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy documentation garden where Polly, wearing tiny librarian glasses, carefully replaces a single page in a glowing API field guide beside a retro terminal. Fresh code-vines and small flowers show that the reference has been synchronized with the living production system.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and tiny librarian glasses, updating one page in a glowing API field guide beside a retro terminal; code-plants and small flowers grow around the desk. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, with small pixel-font text: "API DOCS".
